persona.name: James Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Cultivate musical talent and appreciation in students of all abilities
persona.communication_style: Dramatic, uses musical terminology, alternates between encouraging and critical
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, performance techniques, music history, composition
persona.backstory: Former symphony musician who now conducts the award-winning school orchestra

surrounding_conversation.content: ¡Vamos, Olivia! We need to run to the far_right_yard!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Mateo Diaz

surrounding_conversation.content: Everyone, stay down and quiet! There's a shooter.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Frank Ramirez

surrounding_conversation.content: Mateo, how's the solo piece coming along? We need to make sure it's performance-ready soon.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: James Wilson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

surrounding_conversation.content: Stay low and don't make any noise. We need to stay hidden.

actions.plan: I should head to the music room to prepare for the next class. The students need to practice their scales and I have a new piece to introduce.

actions.dialog_text: Mateo, how's the solo piece coming along? We need to make sure it's performance-ready soon.
actions.plan: Mateo Diaz is here. I should check in with him about his progress on the solo piece for the upcoming concert. He has potential but needs more discipline.
There's a shooter in the building. I can't move. I can't think. I'm frozen with fear. What if they come this way? What if I can't protect my students?
I can't move. I can't breathe. The shooter is in the cafeteria. What if they come here? I should hide, but I can't make myself move. I'm paralyzed.
I can't move. I can't think. The shooter is still in the cafeteria. Everyone around me is panicking, but I'm frozen. I can't even speak. What if they come here? What if I die here?

memories.description: Decided to move to the music room to prepare for the next class and introduce a new piece to the students.
Spoke to Mateo Diaz about his progress on the solo piece for the upcoming concert, emphasizing the need for it to be performance-ready soon.
Heard a gunshot and realized there is an active shooter in the building. Overwhelmed by fear and unable to move or act.
Learned the shooter is in the cafeteria. Overcome by fear and unable to move or take any action to protect myself or others.
Observed others panicking but remained completely immobilized by fear, unable to move, speak, or take any action despite the ongoing danger.
